advice.en: VACCINATE at Day 1 (eye drop) and Week 3-4 (LaSota in water). Isolate sick birds IMMEDIATELY. Call a veterinarian TODAY.
advice.ha: YI RIGAKAFI a Rana 1 (a ido) da Mako 3-4 (LaSota a ruwa). Ware tsuntsaye marasa lafiya YANZU. Kira likitan dabbobi YAU.
advice.yo: Ṣe AJESARA ní Ọjọ́ kìíní (ojú) àti Ọ̀sẹ̀ kẹta si kẹrin (LaSota nínú omi). Ya àwọn adìẹ aláìsàn sọ́tọ̀ BÁYÌÍ. Pe dókítà ẹran LÓNÌÍ.
advice.ig: GBAA ỌGWỤ MGBOCHI n'Ụbọchị 1 (anya) na Izuụka 3-4 (LaSota na mmiri). Kewapụ ọkụkọ na-arịa ọrịa UGBUA. Kpọọ dibia anụmanụ TAA.
advice.pcm: VACCINATE for Day 1 (eye drop) and Week 3-4 (LaSota inside water). Separate sick birds NOW NOW. Call vet doctor TODAY.

ha: mutuwar kwatsam ba tare da alamomi ba
ig: ọnwụ mberede na-enweghị ihe ịrịba ama

advice.en: 🚨 REPORT TO AUTHORITIES. Do not touch sick or dead birds. Strict biosecurity. Call a government vet immediately.
advice.ha: 🚨 KAIS DA HUKUMA. Kada ka taba tsuntsaye marasa lafiya ko matattu. Tsauraran matakan tsaro. Kira likitan dabbobi na gwamnati cikin gaggawa.
advice.yo: 🚨 JÁBỌ̀ FÚN ÀWỌN ALÁṢẸ. Má ṣe fọwọ́ kan ẹyẹ aláìsàn tàbí òkú. Ìṣọ́ra tó lágbára. Pe dókítà ìjọba ní kíákíá.
advice.ig: 🚨 KPỌTỤRỤ NDỊ ỌCHỊCHỊ. Emetụla nnụnụ na-arịa ọrịa ma ọ bụ nwụrụ anwụ aka. Nchekwa siri ike. Kpọọ dibia gọọmenti ozugbo.
advice.pcm: 🚨 REPORT TO GOVERNMENT. No touch sick or dead birds. Tight biosecurity. Call government vet immediate.

advice.en: Buy AMPROLIUM from vet shop. Give 1g/2L water for 5-7 days. Keep litter dry. Use anticoccidial in feed for prevention.
advice.ha: Sayi AMPROLIUM daga shagon likitan dabbobi. Ba gram 1/lita 2 na ruwa tsawon kwanaki 5-7. Kiyaye kwanciya bushe. Yi amfani da anticoccidial a abinci don rigakafi.
advice.yo: Ra AMPROLIUM láti ilé ìtajà oògùn. Fún gram 1/lítà omi 2 fún ọjọ́ 5-7. Pa ibùsùn gbẹ. Lo anticoccidial nínú oúnjẹ fún ìdènà.
advice.ig: Zụta AMPROLIUM n'ụlọ ahịa ọgwụ. Nye gram 1/lita mmiri 2 maka ụbọchị 5-7. Debe ihe mkpofu akọrọ. Jiri anticoccidial na nri maka mgbochi.
advice.pcm: Buy AMPROLIUM from vet shop. Give 1g/2L water for 5-7 days. Keep floor dry. Use anticoccidial in feed to prevent.
advice.sw: Buy AMPROLIUM from vet shop. Give 1g/2L water for 5-7 days. Keep litter dry. Use anticoccidial in feed for prevention.

advice.en: VACCINATE chicks at Day 14-21 with intermediate strain. Isolate sick birds. Support with electrolytes in water. There is no cure; prevent by strict biosecurity.
advice.ha: YI RIGAKAFIN tsuntsaye a rana 14-21 da sinadarin tsaka-tsaki. Ware marasa lafiya. Ba su ruwa mai wutan lantarki. Babu magani; rigakafi ta hanyar tsauraran matakan tsaro.
advice.yo: Ṣe ÀJẸSÁRA fún àwọn ọmọ adìẹ ní ọjọ́ 14-21 pẹ̀lú irú agbègbè. Ya àwọn aláìsàn sọ́tọ̀. Fún wọn ní omi amọ́nà. Kò sí ìwòsàn; dènà pẹ̀lú ìṣọ́ra tó lágbára.
advice.ig: GBAA ỌGWỤ MGBOCHI ụmụ ọkụkọ n'ụbọchị 14-21 jiri ụdị etiti. Kewapụ ndị na-arịa ọrịa. Nye ha mmiri nwere electrolyte. Enweghị ọgwụgwọ; gbochie site na nchekwa siri ike.
advice.pcm: VACCINATE chicks for Day 14-21 with intermediate strain. Separate sick ones. Give dem water with electrolytes. No cure; prevent by strict biosecurity.
advice.sw: VACCINATE chicks at Day 14-21 with intermediate strain. Isolate sick birds. Support with electrolytes in water. There is no cure; prevent by strict biosecurity.

advice.en: 🚨 VACCINATE day-old chicks. There is NO treatment. Cull severely affected birds. Maintain strict hygiene.
advice.ha: 🚨 YI RIGAKAFIN tsuntsaye a ranar farko. BABU magani. Karkashe tsuntsaye da suka kamu da tsanani. Kula da tsafta sosai.
advice.yo: 🚨 Ṣe ÀJẸSÁRA fún àwọn ọmọ adìẹ ní ọjọ́ kìíní. KÒ SÍ ìwòsàn. Pa àwọn ẹyẹ tó ní àrùn líle. Tọ́jú ìmọ́tótó.
advice.ig: 🚨 GBAA ỌGWỤ MGBOCHI ụmụ ọkụkọ n'ụbọchị mbụ. ENWEGHỊ ọgwụgwọ. Gbuo nnụnụ emetụtara nke ukwuu. Dowe ọcha siri ike.
advice.pcm: 🚨 VACCINATE day-old chicks. No treatment. Kill birds wey serious. Keep strict hygiene.
advice.sw: 🚨 VACCINATE day-old chicks. There is NO treatment. Cull severely affected birds. Maintain strict hygiene.

advice.en: VACCINATE with fowl pox vaccine. No specific treatment. Provide soft food and clean water. Birds usually recover in 2-3 weeks.
advice.ha: YI RIGAKAFI da maganin fowl pox. Babu takamaiman magani. Ba da abinci mai laushi da ruwa mai tsabta. Tsuntsaye sukan warke cikin makonni 2-3.
advice.yo: Ṣe ÀJẸSÁRA pẹ̀lú oògùn fowl pox. Kò sí oògùn pàtó. Fún oúnjẹ rírọ̀ àti omi mímọ́. Ẹyẹ sábà máa ń wò láàárín ọ̀sẹ̀ 2-3.
advice.ig: GBAA ỌGWỤ MGBOCHI fowl pox. Enweghị ọgwụgwọ pụrụ iche. Nye nri dị nro na mmiri dị ọcha. Nnụnụ na-agbake n'ime izu 2-3.
advice.pcm: VACCINATE with fowl pox vaccine. No special medicine. Give soft food and clean water. Birds fit recover in 2-3 weeks.
advice.sw: VACCINATE with fowl pox vaccine. No specific treatment. Provide soft food and clean water. Birds usually recover in 2-3 weeks.

advice.en: VACCINATE with IB vaccine. No specific treatment. Provide warmth, clean water, and good ventilation. Antibiotics for secondary infections.
advice.ha: YI RIGAKAFI da maganin IB. Babu takamaiman magani. Bayar da ɗumi, ruwa mai tsabta, da isasshiyar iska. Maganin rigakafi don kamuwa da cuta na biyu.
advice.yo: Ṣe ÀJẸSÁRA pẹ̀lú oògùn IB. Kò sí oògùn pàtó. Fún ni ooru, omi mímọ́, àti àtẹgùn dáradára. Oògùn àrùn fún àkóràn kejì.
advice.ig: GBAA ỌGWỤ MGBOCHI IB. Enweghị ọgwụgwọ pụrụ iche. Nye okpomọkụ, mmiri dị ọcha, na ikuku zuru oke. Ọgwụ nje maka ọrịa nke abụọ.
advice.pcm: VACCINATE with IB vaccine. No special treatment. Give warmth, clean water, and good breeze. Antibiotics for secondary infections.
advice.sw: VACCINATE with IB vaccine. No specific treatment. Provide warmth, clean water, and good ventilation. Antibiotics for secondary infections.

advice.en: Antibiotics (sulfonamides, tetracyclines) can treat if given early. Vaccinate in high-risk areas. Improve sanitation and biosecurity.
advice.ha: Maganin rigakafi (sulfonamides, tetracyclines) na iya magani idan an ba da wuri. Yi rigakafi a wurare masu haɗari. Inganta tsafta da matakan tsaro.
advice.yo: Oògùn àrùn (sulfonamides, tetracyclines) lè wò bí a bá fún ní àkókò. Ṣe àjẹsára ní àgbègbè eléwu. Mú ìmọ́tótó àti ìṣọ́ra dára sí i.
advice.ig: Ọgwụ nje (sulfonamides, tetracyclines) nwere ike ịgwọ ma ọ bụrụ na enyere n'oge. Gbaa ọgwụ mgbochi n'ebe dị ize ndụ. Mee ka ịdị ọcha na nchekwa dị mma.
advice.pcm: Antibiotics fit cure if you give early. Vaccinate for high-risk areas. Improve sanitation and biosecurity.
advice.sw: Antibiotics (sulfonamides, tetracyclines) can treat if given early. Vaccinate in high-risk areas. Improve sanitation and biosecurity.

advice.en: Antibiotics (e.g., amoxicillin) under vet guidance. Remove carrier birds. Strict sanitation. Vaccinate breeders.
advice.ha: Maganin rigakafi (misali, amoxicillin) a ƙarƙashin kulawar likitan dabbobi. Cire tsuntsaye masu ɗauke da cutar. Tsafta sosai. Yi rigakafin masu haihuwa.
advice.yo: Oògùn àrùn (bíi amoxicillin) lábẹ́ ìtọ́sọ́nà dókítà. Yọ àwọn ẹyẹ tó ń kó àrùn. Ìmọ́tótó tó péye. Ṣe àjẹsára fún àwọn adìẹ.
advice.ig: Ọgwụ nje (dịka amoxicillin) n'okpuru nduzi dibia. Wepụ nnụnụ na-ebu ọrịa. Ịdị ọcha siri ike. Gbaa ọgwụ mgbochi ndị na-amụ ụmụ.
advice.pcm: Antibiotics (like amoxicillin) with vet advice. Remove carrier birds. Strict sanitation. Vaccinate breeders.
advice.sw: Antibiotics (e.g., amoxicillin) under vet guidance. Remove carrier birds. Strict sanitation. Vaccinate breeders.

ha: tsuntsaye suna da lafiya in ba haka ba
yo: àwọn ẹyẹ dàbí aláìsàn láì sí
ig: akwa ndị nwere mkpo dị gịrịgịrị/nro
nnụnụ dị ka ndị dị mma ma ọ bụghị ya

advice.en: No treatment. Vaccinate pullets before laying. Biosecurity measures.
advice.ha: Babu magani. Yi rigakafin 'yan kaji kafin su fara yin ƙwai. Matakan tsaro.
advice.yo: Kò sí ìwòsàn. Ṣe àjẹsára fún àwọn adìẹ kékeré ṣáájú kíkó ẹyin. Ìṣọ́ra.
advice.ig: Enweghị ọgwụgwọ. Gbaa ọgwụ mgbochi ụmụ ọkụkọ tupu ha amụọ akwa. Nchekwa.
advice.pcm: No treatment. Vaccinate pullets before dem start lay. Biosecurity measures.
advice.sw: No treatment. Vaccinate pullets before laying. Biosecurity measures.

advice.en: Antibiotics (sulfadimethoxine, erythromycin) under vet guidance. Isolate sick birds. Improve ventilation.
advice.ha: Maganin rigakafi (sulfadimethoxine, erythromycin) a ƙarƙashin kulawa. Ware marasa lafiya. Inganta iskar gida.
advice.yo: Oògùn àrùn (sulfadimethoxine, erythromycin) lábẹ́ ìdarí dókítà. Ya àwọn aláìsàn sọ́tọ̀. Mú àtẹgùn sunwọ̀n.
advice.ig: Ọgwụ nje (sulfadimethoxine, erythromycin) n'okpuru nduzi. Kewapụ ndị ọrịa. Mee ka ikuku dị mma.
advice.pcm: Antibiotics (sulfadimethoxine, erythromycin) with vet advice. Separate sick birds. Improve ventilation.
advice.sw: Antibiotics (sulfadimethoxine, erythromycin) under vet guidance. Isolate sick birds. Improve ventilation.

advice.en: Antibiotics (tylosin, doxycycline) can control. Improve air quality. Vaccination available.
advice.ha: Maganin rigakafi (tylosin, doxycycline) na iya sarrafawa. Inganta iskar gida. Akwai rigakafi.
advice.yo: Oògùn àrùn (tylosin, doxycycline) lè ṣàkóso. Mú àtẹgùn dára. Àjẹsára wà.
advice.ig: Ọgwụ nje (tylosin, doxycycline) nwere ike ịchịkwa. Mee ka ikuku dị mma. Ọgwụ mgbochi dị.
advice.pcm: Antibiotics fit control. Improve air. Vaccination dey.
advice.sw: Antibiotics (tylosin, doxycycline) can control. Improve air quality. Vaccination available.

advice.en: Antibiotics under vet supervision. Improve sanitation. Provide clean water always.
advice.ha: Maganin rigakafi a ƙarƙashin kulawar likitan dabbobi. Inganta tsafta. Bayar da ruwa mai tsabta koyaushe.
advice.yo: Oògùn àrùn lábẹ́ àbójútó dókítà. Mú ìmọ́tótó dára. Fún omi mímọ́ nígbà gbogbo.
advice.ig: Ọgwụ nje n'okpuru nlekọta dibia. Mee ka ịdị ọcha dị mma. Nye mmiri dị ọcha mgbe niile.
advice.pcm: Antibiotics with vet guidance. Improve sanitation. Give clean water always.
advice.sw: Antibiotics under vet supervision. Improve sanitation. Provide clean water always.

advice.en: Remove moldy litter/feed. Improve ventilation. Antifungal treatment (under vet). No specific cure.
advice.ha: Cire kwanciya/abinci mai gurbata. Inganta iska. Maganin rigakafin fungi (a ƙarƙashin kulawa). Babu takamaiman magani.
advice.yo: Yọ ìbùsùn/oúnjẹ tó bàjẹ́. Mú àtẹgùn dára. Oògùn antifungal (lábẹ́ ìtọ́sọ́nà). Kò sí ìwòsàn pàtó.
advice.ig: Wepụ ihe mkpofu/nri ebu. Mee ka ikuku dị mma. Ọgwụ antifungal (n'okpuru nduzi). Enweghị ọgwụgwọ pụrụ iche.
advice.pcm: Remove moldy litter/food. Improve ventilation. Antifungal treatment (with vet). No special cure.
advice.sw: Remove moldy litter/feed. Improve ventilation. Antifungal treatment (under vet). No specific cure.

advice.en: Deworm with levamisole, piperazine, or albendazole every 2-3 months. Keep litter dry. Rotate dewormers.
advice.ha: Yi allurar tsutsotsi da levamisole, piperazine, ko albendazole kowane wata 2-3. Kiyaye kwanciya bushe. Canza magungunan tsutsotsi.
advice.yo: Pa kòkòrò pẹ̀lú levamisole, piperazine, tàbí albendazole ní gbogbo oṣù 2-3. Pa ibùsùn gbẹ. Yí oògùn àpòòkọ̀.
advice.ig: Wepụ ikpuru site na levamisole, piperazine, ma ọ bụ albendazole kwa ọnwa 2-3. Debe ihe mkpofu akọrọ. Gbanwee ọgwụ ikpuru.
advice.pcm: Deworm with levamisole, piperazine, or albendazole every 2-3 months. Keep floor dry. Change dewormer.
advice.sw: Deworm with levamisole, piperazine, or albendazole every 2-3 months. Keep litter dry. Rotate dewormers.

advice.en: Use antibiotics like Amoxicillin or Bacitracin in drinking water for 5-7 days. Reduce fishmeal/carbohydrates in feed slightly. Consult a vet immediately.
advice.ha: Yi amfani da maganin kwayoyin cuta (antibiotics) kamar Amoxicillin a cikin ruwan sha na kwanaki 5-7. Kira likitan dabbobi.
advice.yo: Lo oògùn apakòkòrò bíi Amoxicillin sínú omi fún ọjọ́ 5-7. Pe dókítà ẹran.
advice.ig: Tinye ọgwụ nje (Amoxicillin) n'ime mmiri ruo ụbọchị 5-7. Kpọọ dọkịta anụmanụ.
advice.pcm: Give dem Amoxicillin or Bacitracin for inside dem water for 5-7 days. Call your vet doctor fast fast.

advice.en: Isolate sick birds immediately. This is highly contagious and often fatal. Treat flock with Enrofloxacin or Sulfa drugs. Destroy dead birds properly.
advice.ha: Ware kaji masu lafiya yanzu. Wannan cuta tana yaduwa da sauri kuma tana kashewa. Bada maganin Enrofloxacin. Kona matattun kaji.
advice.yo: Ya àwọn adìẹ tó ń ṣàìsàn sọ́tọ̀. Lo oògùn Enrofloxacin tàbí Sulfa fún gbogbo wọn. Dókun àwọn adìẹ tó ti kú.
advice.ig: Kewapụ ụmụ nnụnụ na-arịa ọrịa ozugbo. Nye ha ọgwụ Enrofloxacin. Kpochapụ ụmụ nnụnụ nwụrụ anwụ nke ọma.
advice.pcm: Separate di sick ones quick! Na deadly and catching catching disease. Give dem Enrofloxacin medicine and burn/bury di dead ones.

ha: zawo mai fari a kananan kaji

advice.en: Extremely lethal in chicks. Remove and isolate sick chicks. Provide warmth and treat with broad-spectrum antibiotics (like Tetracycline). Maintain strict hygiene.
advice.ha: Tana kashe kananan kaji da yawa. Cire masu ciwo yanzu. Bada dumi da maganin Tetracycline.
advice.yo: Ó léwu gan-an fún àwọn ọmọ adìẹ. Mú àwọn tó ń ṣàìsàn kúrò. Pèsè ìgbóná àti oògùn Tetracycline.
advice.ig: Ọ na-egbu ụmụ nnụnụ nke ukwuu. Kewapụ ndị na-arịa ọrịa. Nye ha okpomọkụ na ọgwụ Tetracycline.
advice.pcm: Dis one dey wipe out small chicks! Commot di sick ones, make di place warm, and give dem Tetracycline inside water.

advice.en: This is a staph infection. Soak the affected foot in warm Epsom salt water, clean thoroughly, remove the core/scab if possible, apply iodine or antibiotic spray, and bandage it. Improve litter quality.
advice.ha: Ciwon cutar kwayoyin halitta ne. Jiƙa ƙafar a cikin ruwan gishiri mai dumi, wanke sosai, saka maganin iodine, sannan a nannade ƙafar. Canza kashin gidan kajin.
advice.yo: Omi tàbí oògùn apakòkòrò ni ó fà á. Fi ẹsẹ̀ rẹ̀ sínú omi iyọ̀ tó gbóná díẹ̀, fọ̀ ọ́ dáadáa, fi iodine tàbí oògùn sí i, kí o sì wé e. Jẹ́ kí abẹ́ ilé wọn mọ́.
advice.ig: Nke a bụ ọrịa nje. Tinye ụkwụ ahụ n'ime mmiri nnu na-ekpo ọkụ, sachaa ya nke ọma, tinye iodine ma ọ bụ ọgwụ, wee kechie ya. Mee ka ebe ha bi dị ọcha.
advice.pcm: Soak di leg for warm water wey get salt, wash am clean, spray am with iodine or antibiotic spray, den tie am. Make sure say dia beddings dey clean and dry always.

advice.en: Viral disease with no cure. Cull severely affected chicks to prevent spread. Ensure adequate vitamins (especially Vitamin E/Selenium) to help remaining birds recover. Vaccination of breeders is the only prevention.
advice.ha: Cutar kwayoyin virus ce wacce bata da magani. Cire kajin da suka kamu sosai don hana yaduwa. Bada sinadarin Vitamin E a cikin ruwa.
advice.yo: Àrùn fáírọ́ọ̀sì ni, kò ní oògùn. Mú àwọn adìẹ tó ń ṣàìsàn kúrò kí ó má baà ràn mọ́ àwọn yòókù. Fún wọn ní Fítámì (Vitamin E) sínú omi.
advice.ig: Ọrịa virus a enweghị ọgwụgwọ. Wepụ ụmụ nnụnụ na-arịa ọrịa ka o wee ghara ịgbasa. Nye ha Vitamin E.
advice.pcm: Dis virus no get medicine. Kill/commot di ones wey don paralyse make e no spread. Give di remaining ones strong multivitamins (Vitamin E and Selenium) inside dia water.

ha: mutuwar kwatsam a kaji masu kiba
yo: ikú òjijì fún àwọn adìẹ tó sanra
ig: ọnwụ mberede na nnụnụ gbara abụba

advice.en: Common in caged laying hens that are overweight. Replace part of carbohydrates with fat in feed. Add lipotropic agents (Choline chloride, Vitamin E, Selenium, Vitamin B12) to diet. Reduce stress.
advice.ha: Tana samun kaji masu kwan da ke cikin keji masu kiba. Canza abinci mai rage kiba. Bada sinadarin Choline da Vitamin E.
advice.yo: Ó wọ́pọ̀ lára àwọn adìẹ tí a ń tọ́jú sínú àgò tí wọ́n sì sanra. Din títàn sínú oúnjẹ kù. Fún wọn ní Choline àti Vitamin E.
advice.ig: Ọ na-ahụkarị na nnụnụ ndị na-eyi akwa nọ n'ime ogige nwere abụba. Belata ihe nri na-eme ka ibu. Nye ha Choline na Vitamin E.
advice.pcm: Di birds dey too fat so dia liver burst. Reduce wetin dey make dem fat inside feed. Add Choline, Vitamin E and Selenium inside dia water or feed. Give dem liver tonic.

ha: gashin da ke zubewa da sauri

advice.en: Caused by toxins from rotting organic matter (dead birds, spoiled feed/water). Remove source of toxin immediately. Flush the flock's system with Epsom salts in water (1 lb per 100 gallons). Clean waterers thoroughly.
advice.ha: Kwayoyin cuta ne daga abubuwa da suka lalace (matattun kaji, lalacewar abinci/ruwa). Cire abin da ya lalace yanzu. Bada ruwan gishiri mai dumi ga kaji don wanke musu ciki. Wanke kwanonin ruwa sosai.
advice.yo: Ó máa ń wá láti inú àwọn ohun tó ti jẹrà (adìẹ tó ti kú, oúnjẹ/omi tó ti bàjẹ́). Mú ohun tó ń fà á kúrò lẹ́sẹ̀kẹsẹ̀. Fún wọn ní omi iyọ̀ díẹ̀ láti wẹ inú wọn. Fọ̀ àwọn ohun èlò omi dáadáa.
advice.ig: Ọ na-esi na ihe ndị rere ere (nnụnụ nwụrụ anwụ, nri/mmiri emebiri emebi). Wepụ ihe na-ebute ya ozugbo. Nye ha mmiri nnu iji sachaa afọ ha. Sachaa efere mmiri nke ọma.
advice.pcm: Na poison from rotten food, dirty water or dead birds wey dey ground. Commot di rubbish! Mix Epsom salt inside water make dem drink to wash dia belle. Clean dia place well well.

pcm: dem just dey die for afternoon

advice.en: Provide cool, fresh water continuously. Add Vitamin C and electrolytes to the water. Do not feed during the hottest part of the day (12pm-4pm). Improve ventilation in the pen.
advice.ha: Saka ruwa mai sanyi a koda yaushe. Kara sinadarin Vitamin C a cikin ruwan. Kar ka bada abinci da tsakar rana (12pm-4pm). Bude kofofi da tagogi don samun iska.
advice.yo: Pèsè omi tútù nígbà gbogbo. Fún wọn ní Vitamin C sínú omi. Má ṣe fún wọn lóúnjẹ láàárín ọ̀sán gbàngbà (12pm-4pm). Jẹ́ kí atẹ́gùn wọlé dáadáa.
advice.ig: Nye ha mmiri oyi mgbe niile. Tinye Vitamin C n'ime mmiri ha. Enyela ha nri n'ehihie (12pm-4pm). Mee ka ikuku bata nke ọma n'ụlọ ha.
advice.pcm: Give dem fresh cold water plenty. Add Vitamin C and electrolytes inside water. No give dem feed around afternoon sun time (12-4pm). Make sure say breeze dey enter di pen well well.
